# Radial Basis Function

**Summary**: A function whose value depends only on the distance from a center point.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2019-ahmed|Ahmed, 2019]] implemented radial basis function (RBF) as an AI method for loss prediction.
